card_description: Dr. Bucke is a divine or mythological figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies his experience as an "evolutionary advance" (Cosmic Consciousness) and the "next step up" for the human species."
